default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy and progress, and plan for the Phase 1 decision.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Pivot:** Product listicles will be revised to avoid praising competitor features that Read AI already offers (e.g., CRM integration, free multi-meeting analytics). The new approach is to highlight unique competitor capabilities that Read AI does *not* have.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Strong Early Performance:** With 9 articles published, organic traffic is on track, doubling week-over-week to 20+ sessions. This growth is occurring despite a live Google Core update that is causing search ranking volatility.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Phase 1 Decision:** A decision on continuing the partnership is required by **Dec 22nd** for a **Dec 29th** transition. A formal review with Read AI leadership (Sarah, Tyler) is scheduled for next Monday to inform this decision.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: Product Listicles

  - [**Problem:** The "9 Best AI Meeting Apps" article was too complimentary to competitors, highlighting features Read AI already provides.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**New Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [**Focus:** Be factual and position Read AI for its specific use case.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [**Competitor Mentions:** Highlight unique capabilities Read AI does *not* have (e.g., Gong's sales forecasting).](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [**Avoid:**](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
          - ["Throwing shade" at competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
          - [Highlighting competitor features that Read AI already offers.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**TLDRs:** Revise to remove Fathom mentions and focus on unique competitor benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Internal Consistency:** Standardize product terminology (e.g., "Personal Knowledge Graph") and emphasize multi-channel access (desktop, mobile apps).](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [**Disclaimer:** Add a note to all listicles stating the content's last update date.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### Performance & Progress

  - [**Published:** 9 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**In Review:** 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Sprint Goal:** 19 delivered articles by end-of-year.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [**Traffic (Looker Dashboard):**](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [Organic traffic is on track, doubling week-over-week to 20+ sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [**Context:** A live Google Core update is causing temporary ranking volatility. Aida expects stability to return in early January.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Phase 1 Summary:** A document summarizing the strategy and early results is available for review.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

### Phase 1 Decision & Review

  - [**Decision Deadline:** Monday, Dec 22nd.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**Transition Date:** Dec 29th.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**Review Meeting:** A formal meeting is scheduled for next Monday to review Phase 1 results with Read AI leadership (Sarah, Tyler) before the decision.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [Revise product listicles per the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/UCofn9qyBmv_FesT7xcZSxB8_mkbArKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
